raw_consumer_statement:
I have an Amex XXXX card, and I was given {$200.00} in hotel credits. I booked a hotel on XXXX ( {$350.00} ) and I was credited {$55.00}, which are correct. However, when I cancelled that hotel booking on XXXX, I got refunded ( {$350.00} ), and also a charge back of {$250.00}. I understand that the credit will be clawed back, but the amount should be {$55.00}, b not {$250.00}. 

I have tried to contact Amex and they always redirect me to Amex travel. And Amex travel always says that they are investigating, but have not got back to me.
